project_identity.name: Prompt Injection Defense System
project_identity.emotional_archetype: The Performance Pro (Elite Cybersec) / Electric & Neon

rules: Body text MUST use IBM Plex Sans for readability.
Data values, logs, and code snippets MUST use JetBrains Mono.
Use uppercase with wide tracking (tracking-widest) for labels and overlines.

usage.primary: Safe states, Success actions, Main CTAs, 'System Active' indicators
usage.danger: Attack Detected, Blocked, High Risk, Destructive actions
usage.background: Global background. NEVER use pure black #000000, use #050505 to avoid OLED smearing and harsh contrast.

spacing_layout.border_radius: rounded-sm (2px or 4px) - Sharp edges preferred for 'tech' feel
rules: Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6) to prevent text collision.
Mobile-first: grid-cols-1 on mobile, grid-cols-4 or grid-cols-12 on desktop.

buttons.style: Sharp edges, 1px solid border. Hover: Fill color or Glow effect.
buttons.classes: rounded-sm border border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary hover:text-black transition-all duration-200 font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

cards.style: Flat dark surface, 1px border. No heavy shadows. Technical look.

inputs.style: Terminal input style. Dark background, monospace font.

charts.style: Minimal axes, neon strokes, dark tooltip backgrounds.

visual_enhancers.scanlines: Overlay a repeating linear gradient to simulate CRT scanlines on the main dashboard container. (pointer-events-none)
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use drop-shadow or box-shadow with color to create 'neon' glow on active elements.
visual_enhancers.terminal_cursor: Use a blinking block cursor for the Attack Playground input.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly. Only for sticky headers or modals. High blur (backdrop-blur-xl), low opacity.

images.description: Abstract digital data stream/matrix green for Login Page background.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text labels on colored badges meet 4.5:1 ratio. Use black text on neon backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings (ring-2 ring-primary) for keyboard navigation.

universal_guidelines: Use 'data-testid' on ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, chart containers).
DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid dark colors or subtle noise textures.
The UI should feel like a tool used by a professional, not a video game. Balance 'cool' with 'usable'.
Defense Layer Visualization: Use a horizontal pipeline flow (Input -> Layer 1 -> Layer 2 -> ... -> Output).
Logs: Display them in a monospaced list, resembling a server log tail.
instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize the app with the dark theme class by default.
Install 'clsx' and 'tailwind-merge' for class handling if not present.
Create a 'Layout' component that applies the global dark background and font styles.
Use the provided image URL for the Login page background (cover, low brightness).
